_comment_capabilities: Port-less organs. THE RULE: if an organ is not visible from the front door, it does not exist (the sonarzum lesson, 2026-07-13 ‚ÄĒ a whole site-builder rusted unseen because only port-services were registered). Every capability here gets a card in the hub sidebar with HOW to invoke it. kind: slash = Claude Code command, cli = terminal, agent = autonomous gateway tool, extension = browser. home = the top-level dir it lives in (audit_services checks every organ dir is accounted for).

_comment_audit_ignore_dirs: Top-level dirs reviewed 2026-07-13 and consciously NOT front-door organs: orchestrator = internal LangGraph spine (its face is the panel); claude-agents = Claude Code control plane; lab = prototypes/experiments; notion-workers = sandboxed worker drafts; n8n = retired stack configs; jarvis = configs for the S…ôs & Jarvis world (external); mcp-servers = docs only; youtube-ai-toolkit = static deliverables; published = publish_site output sink (its front door IS registered - the published-sites static server on 8767, under "external" - but organ_coverage only reads services/capabilities, so the output dir itself needs this entry); review-queue = the research lab content studio‚Äôs human-review drop (drafts awaiting approval), an output queue, not an organ.
_comment_external: Other worlds on this machine, curated so the front door can SEE everything (status dots) without merging the worlds. ui = has a browser UI; tunnel = Mac launcher forwards this port; retired = kept only until formal shutdown (2026-05 audit).
